{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232015463A810BF82798296B99FE"}"},"total":89},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589366641803985726","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"😂挖到宝了！这本第四天灾文也太沙雕搞笑了吧！把网游玩家的真实操作搬进修真宗门，氪金、肝任务、搞事的样子简直和现实里的玩家一模一样，代入感直接拉满。无女主的设定超赞，全程专注玩家和宗门的沙雕互动，群像刻画也有特色，轻松解压不费脑，就是连载中有点追更急人！#玄幻脑洞 #玄幻 #第四天灾 #无女主","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":9,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268146296B99FE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227589366641803985726%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227576683882498509849%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767053089,"group_id":"7576683882498509849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是一个吃瓜群众🤭","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzIX6mfFSLmje8L4cy+zIYmCSx5mDCKnE0Js+ex/TejC","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2388591959882020","user_name":"爱吃甜薯奶的云道老尊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2388591959882020","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576683882498509849","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】+【群像】+【无女主】+【幕后流】+【全员沙雕】＋【轻松】
土著修士甲： “听说了吗？那归元宗就是个魔窟！弟子个个不怕死，打架专攻下三路，还随身带着屎！” 土著修士乙： “太可怕了！我上次见他们几十个人围着一个魔族祭坛跳大神，愣是把那魔魂给跳崩溃了！” 多宝阁掌柜： “别提了！他们就是一群强盗！上次一百多个人围着我砍价，我差点死在那！”

归元宗宗主江辰（捂脸）： “累了，毁灭吧。这届弟子真的太难带了……”

玩家（兴奋脸）： “宗主别丧气啊！新活动什么时候开？听说隔壁青阳宗的护山神兽挺肥的，咱们什么时候去把它炖了？”

这是一个被迫营业的宗主，带着一群除了好事什么都干的沙雕玩家，把修仙界搅得天翻地覆的欢乐故事。
